CustomField.formula: NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c , "CO"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "CL"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "CP"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "PM"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "DS"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "TS"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "CA"), ISPICKVAL($User.FEC_User_Group__c, "IA") ) )
CustomField.label: Is Non Restricted Group
